items.name: i18n
items.description: SIGNNG_I18N token + provideSignngI18n() — translate all built-in UI strings from one place.

items.name: data-table
items.description: Smart DataTable: sort, global search, row selection, inline edit, grouping, pagination, CSV export.

items.name: chart-analytics
items.description: Multi-series analytics charts: multi-line, stacked/grouped bars, scatter, heatmap, legend, hover crosshair.

items.name: file-upload
items.description: Drag-and-drop FileUpload + ImageUpload (thumbnail preview), type/size validation.

items.name: login-form
items.description: Composed auth block (login / signup / forgot) with optional social providers.

items.name: stat-card
items.description: KPI tile: label, value, colored delta chip, optional icon.

items.name: empty-state
items.description: Centered empty/zero-results placeholder with icon, title, action slot.

items.name: timeline
items.description: Vertical activity feed with colored nodes, title, time, description.

items.name: stepper
items.description: Multi-step wizard progress indicator (numbered nodes, connectors, aria-current).

items.name: number-input
items.description: Numeric spinner: clamp, step, prefix/suffix, arrow keys, role=spinbutton.

items.name: multi-select
items.description: Multi-select with removable chips + toggle checklist panel (aria-multiselectable).

items.name: tag-input
items.description: Free-text tag entry: Enter/comma adds, Backspace removes, dedup.

items.name: tree-view
items.description: Collapsible hierarchy (file-explorer), recursive ng-template, role=tree.

items.name: date-range-picker
items.description: Popover month grid selecting a start-end date range with tinted in-range days.

items.name: rating
items.description: Star rating control (hover preview, keyboard, role=slider).

items.name: color-picker
items.description: Color picker: preset swatches + native picker + hex field, popover.

items.name: kanban
items.description: Drag-and-drop Kanban board on @angular/cdk/drag-drop (reorder + cross-column transfer).

items.name: notification-center
items.description: Bell trigger + unread badge + dropdown inbox (mark read / mark all).

items.name: form
items.description: Validation-aware field (shadcn <Form> analogue): label + control + auto error from reactive-forms validators, aria wired.

items.name: range-slider
items.description: Two-thumb range slider [low, high] (Radix-style): pointer drag + keyboard, role=slider per thumb.

items.name: toolbar
items.description: role=toolbar with WAI-ARIA roving tabindex (single tab stop, arrow/Home/End) + separators.

items.name: spinner
items.description: Loading spinner (role=status, accessible label, animate-spin, reduced-motion safe).

items.name: time-picker
items.description: Hour + minute picker via native selects (HH:mm, configurable minute step), zero deps.

items.name: segmented
items.description: iOS-style segmented control with sliding pill indicator (role=radiogroup, arrow keys).

items.name: transfer
items.description: Dual-list transfer/shuttle: check + move items between source and target panels.

items.name: descriptions
items.description: Semantic key/value detail list (dl/dt/dd) in a column grid; optional bordered box.

items.name: code
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code block (always-dark like shadcn) + copy button; safe tokenizer, no deps.

items.name: utils
items.description: cn() class-merge helper.

items.name: button
items.description: Button with CVA variants. WCAG 2.2 AA focus + target size.

items.name: slider
items.description: Accessible slider styled on the @signng/core/slider primitive.

items.name: switch
items.description: Accessible switch (role=switch) on @signng/core/switch.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: Tri-state checkbox (role=checkbox, mixed) on @signng/core/checkbox.

items.name: input
items.description: Styled native input.

items.name: label
items.description: Styled native label.

items.name: overlay
items.description: CDK overlay prebuilt CSS + dialog backdrop. Required by dialog/tooltip/popover.

items.name: dialog
items.description: Modal dialog (focus trap, backdrop, Esc, restore focus) on @signng/core/dialog.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: Tooltip via CDK connected overlay (hover/focus, role=tooltip).

items.name: radio-group
items.description: Accessible radio group (roving tabindex, arrow nav) on @signng/core/radio-group.

items.name: popover
items.description: Non-modal popover (CDK connected overlay, outside-click + Esc dismiss).

items.name: textarea
items.description: Styled native textarea.

items.name: accordion
items.description: Accordion over @angular/aria (keyboard, aria-expanded, lazy content inherited).

items.name: select
items.description: Select: trigger + CDK overlay hosting @angular/aria Listbox (single-select).

items.name: card
items.description: Card part directives (header/title/description/content/footer).

items.name: badge
items.description: Badge with CVA variants.

items.name: separator
items.description: Separator (role=separator, orientation).

items.name: avatar
items.description: Avatar with image + initials fallback; src run through an image-scoped URL allowlist.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.description: Confirm/cancel modal (role=alertdialog) on @signng/core/dialog.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: Dropdown menu over @angular/aria Menu (role=menu, roving, typeahead) in a CDK overlay.

items.name: calendar
items.description: Date-grid calendar (controlled APG grid: arrows/Home/End/PageUp-Down, Intl labels).

items.name: date-picker
items.description: Date picker: trigger button + Calendar in a CDK overlay dialog (focus trap, Esc).

items.name: combobox
items.description: Searchable single-select (controlled APG combobox: input + CDK overlay listbox).

items.name: sheet
items.description: Side drawer (edge-positioned modal) on @signng/core/dialog.

items.name: toast
items.description: Toast service + viewport (signal queue, auto-dismiss, aria-live status/alert).

items.name: alert
items.description: Alert callout (title/description directives, CVA variants).

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Skeleton loading placeholder (decorative, aria-hidden).

items.name: progress
items.description: Progress bar (role=progressbar, aria-valuenow/min/max).

items.name: table
items.description: Table part directives (native semantics + skin).

items.name: toggle
items.description: Two-state toggle button (aria-pressed, CVA variants).

items.name: collapsible
items.description: Single disclosure (aria-expanded + lazy region).

items.name: hover-card
items.description: Supplementary hover/focus card (CDK overlay, hoverable, Esc).

items.name: drawer
items.description: Bottom-sheet drawer (grab handle) on @signng/core/dialog.

items.name: form-field
items.description: Form field wrapper (label + control + description + error, role=alert).

items.name: sidebar
items.description: Collapsible app-shell sidebar (header/content/footer + items + trigger).

items.name: chart
items.description: Minimal pure-SVG charts (bar, line, donut, sparkline) — signals, role=img, no deps.

items.name: icon
items.description: Owned minimal stroke icon set (~30 feather-style) rendered as path d (no innerHTML).

items.name: navigation-menu
items.description: Navigation menu: disclosure triggers revealing projected panels (CDK overlay, hover/click).

items.name: menubar
items.description: Menubar: role=menubar of menu buttons, each an @angular/aria Menu in a CDK overlay.

items.name: input-otp
items.description: Segmented OTP input (role=group, auto-advance, paste, numeric autofill).

items.name: carousel
items.description: Carousel region (prev/next + arrow keys, aria-roledescription, live region).

items.name: resizable
items.description: Resizable two-panel split (pointer drag + keyboard, role=separator).

items.name: toggle-group
items.description: Roving toggle group (single/multiple, role=group, arrow nav) reusing toggle variants.

items.name: context-menu
items.description: Right-click menu over @angular/aria Menu, positioned at the pointer (CDK overlay).

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: Styled scroll container (thin themed scrollbar).

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.description: Aspect-ratio box.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Breadcrumb nav part directives (aria-current page, separator).

items.name: pagination
items.description: Pagination nav (prev/next + windowed page numbers, aria-current page).

items.name: command
items.description: Command palette: modal (@signng/core/dialog) + filtered command listbox.

items.name: theme
items.description: SignNG oklch theme (Tailwind v4 @theme + dark). tweakcn-compatible.
